title: Tapping to Release Fear of Taxes and Inheritance Loss
subtitle: A tapping practice for working through the worry that taxes or legal systems will erode the wealth you are building
excerpt: A five-minute tapping practice from Day 73 of a 12-week money programme. The script works with the fear that taxes, fees, or legal complications will eat away the wealth you are building, and moves toward a settled confidence in planning, structures, and the right advisors.
sourceNotes: The tapping framework is Gary Craig's Emotional Freedom Technique (EFT), in use since the mid-1990s. The script is adapted from Day 73 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796).

practice.whenToUse: Use when the thought of taxes, inheritance rules, or legal structures has you avoiding the planning your wealth actually needs.

content.text: A five-minute tapping practice from Day 73 of a 12-week money programme. The script works with the fear that taxes, fees, or inheritance rules will reduce or erase the wealth you are working to build, and moves toward trusting that the right structures and advisors can keep it intact.
New to tapping? Read
how EFT tapping works
first.
The practice
Karate chop
Even though I've worried that taxes or fees will eat away wealth, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though I've feared inheritance might be lost, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though those worries have slowed my planning, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Tapping round
Eyebrow: I imagine heavy taxes reducing what I leave.
Side of eye: I worry about legal issues.
Under eye: I fear complicated rules.
Under nose: I feel uneasy about the unknown.
Chin: I don't want hard-earned money to vanish.
Collarbone: I'm ready to release this fear.
Under arm: I trust I'll find the right experts.
Top of head: I allow wealth to stay protected.
Reframe to positive
Eyebrow: I choose wise planning to keep wealth safe.
Side of eye: I attract excellent legal and tax guidance.
Under eye: I trust structures like trusts and companies.
Under nose: I know abundance can be preserved.
Chin: I feel calm making smart arrangements.
Collarbone: I protect every asset for the long term.
Under arm: I pass on wealth in full and with ease.
Top of head: I feel safe knowing our legacy is secure.
Tap each round three times, then move to the reframe and tap that three times.
Where this practice comes from

The tapping framework is Gary Craig's Emotional Freedom Technique (EFT), developed in the mid-1990s from Roger Callahan's Thought Field Therapy. The script is adapted from Day 73 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
